variations.name: Brombacher Countergambit

annotation.moveRationale: c5 challenges the center from the flank in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
f3 advances a pawn, influencing the structure in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
Nf6 develops the knight while attacking the e4 pawn in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
Nc3 develops toward the center, supporting the pawn structure in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
dxe4 impacts the center, shaping the pawn structure in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
e4 impacts the center, shaping the pawn structure in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
d5 advances a pawn, influencing the structure in the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.
d4 claims the center and opens the diagonal for the queen's bishop, characteristic of the Blackmar-Diemer Gambit Declined.

variations.pgn: 1. d4 d5 2. e4 dxe4 3. Nc3 Nf6 4. f3 c5
